item_specifications.special_feature: Comfortable, Door Latches, Double Door, Metal Wire Side Paneling

about_item: MULTI-FUNCTIONAL PET FURNITURE: This stylish dog kennel not only provides a secure space for your small dog but also doubles as an elegant side table or nightstand, blending seamlessly with your home decor. The white finish adds a touch of sophistication to any room, making it a functional and attractive addition to your living space.

DURABLE DESIGN: Crafted with engineered wood and strong metal wire, this indoor dog crate is designed for durability and stability. The construction ensures your pet’s safety while offering a sturdy piece of furniture that complements your home. The kennel comes with a comfortable, removable pet bed, offering a cozy spot for your dog to rest.

EASY ACCESS WITH DOUBLE DOORS: Featuring two doors, including a side door and an end door, this dog crate allows easy access for both you and your pet. The versatile entry points make it convenient to place the kennel in various locations within your home, providing flexibility in how you use your space.

SPACE-SAVING & STYLISH: This compact dog kennel is ideal for small dogs, offering a cozy space without sacrificing style. The kennel's wide top surface is perfect for placing decorative items like lamps, books, or plants, turning this functional pet furniture into a chic accent piece that enhances your room's ambiance.

IDEAL SIZE & EASY MAINTENANCE: External dimensions of this dog kennel are 23” Width x 32” Depth x 26” Height, while the internal space measures 20.5” Width x 30” Depth x 22” Height, making it ideal for small-sized dogs. The included pet bed is machine washable, and the kennel’s smooth surfaces are easy to wipe clean, ensuring your pet’s space stays fresh and tidy.

features.title: Comfy Fitted Sleeping Bed
features.text: This Kennel also includes a 2.75” padded, removable dog bed adding extra comfort for your pup.

features.title: Decorative Design
features.text: Wood is crafted elegantly and is stained with a classic espresso providing a handsome and luxurious feel to the room. The wooden dog crate is equipped with brass hardware for securely locking the kennel door while providing a classy look.

features.title: Single or Double Door Access
features.text: The dog kennel includes two entry and exit points (double side door & end door) for easy accessibility.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate matches their white trim and appreciate its sturdiness and ease of assembly. The double doors on the side receive positive feedback, though opinions about size are mixed, with some finding it great while others say it's too small. Durability is a concern as multiple customers report receiving units with cracked and broken sides. Value for money opinions are divided between those who consider it a great value and those who find it pricey for low quality.

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers report significant durability issues with the dog kennel, noting that three sides arrived cracked and broken, and the kennel scratches easily. One customer mentions that the turn locks can break very easily.

It’s durable, comfortable and honestly everyone raves about what a beautiful kennel it is....

authors_reviews.title: Great Dog Crate
authors_reviews.text: We purchased this for our Mini Aussie. The original order stated “Large” but the item came packaged stating “Medium” crate. I was a little worried it wouldn’t be big enough but after assembly I was pleasantly surprised by the size! My 75lb lab even went and laid in it and fit just fine.The assembly was easy with detailed pictures. Only suggestion I would make is to make sure you keep track of all the screws and don’t accidentally lose one during assembly because you do not get any extra in the package.The crate is very well built and sturdy. It has a great design and doesn’t look like an ugly dog bed just laying there (As we put ours in our living room).The only drawback is I did order the extra tray to put in the bottom under the pad just in case she had a potty accident in there I didn’t want it getting into the wood. The tray fits, but you can tell it was not made specifically for this crate because it does not fit snug into the bottom. I would still recommend getting the tray because when the pad is on top of it you can’t tell and it is still comfortable to our Aussie.I love the fact you have a large door on the side and a small one up front so you can position the crate almost anywhere and with the wire sides she is able to look out and not feel so closed off when we are gone
authors_reviews.author: Rene W

authors_reviews.title: Quality dog crate
authors_reviews.text: Quality product. Very attractive. Easy assembly
authors_reviews.author: Brad M

authors_reviews.title: Perfect
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this for our new Yorkie puppy. It's the perfect size. Well made, very sturdy. Looks really nice. We did have a problem with one door.I contacted the seller and they were super quick at getting back to me. The entire thing was taken care of in minutes. They are replacing the door and didn't want the other one sent back. Very pleased with their service and love the pen.
authors_reviews.author: Rhonda Henning

authors_reviews.title: Contemporary chic style
authors_reviews.text: Contemporary decor style fits in perfect in my home . It’s sturdy easy to assemble and my yorkie seems to like it . Huge upgrade from her play pen that she was used to but this crate looks pretty and it blends in perfectly with my chic style in my living space . The doors look secure . I recommend this for small and medium size dogs only . I’m hoping she doesn’t bite on the fake wood because it’s not real wood . It will take time for her to re adjust . Baby steps to crate training is recommended with this crate because the lock n latches don’t feel secure if you have an aggressive dog it will break . This crate is more of an investment decor piece because I didn’t want a regular type of crate .
authors_reviews.author: Cm0n3y95

authors_reviews.title: Hard to assemble
authors_reviews.text: DO NOT install all screws. Assembling the kennel took me longer than it should have. I followed the instructions and noticed that the sizing was inaccurate and made it impossible for all parts to fit in place. I disassembled the parts, took some screws off, installed the parts opposing the instructions provided and finally the kennel fell in place beautifully. Don’t get me wrong, after I was able to get the kennel to fit, the kennel was beautiful as I expected. Leaving some screws off doesn’t affect the sturdiness. You can still move it around from place to place without anything falling apart. The weight of the kennel is pretty heavy to say the least. I also like how I can decorate the kennel to look like a piece of furniture without it actually looking like a kennel. I would give this product a 5 star but because of the assembling difficulty and incorrect sizing, I can only give it a 4 star rating.
authors_reviews.author: EvelynBrose

authors_reviews.title: This cage is really cute!
authors_reviews.text: This cage is a little expensive but it is honestly worth it! I love it so much and it matches my room perfectly. I got it for my French Bulldog because he needed a little bit more of a bigger cage. This cage is a lot bigger and he has a lot of room to move around. It may be a little bit too big but he will be fine. Maybe I will get another small dog and they can share it. :) This cage seems like it will last his whole life and then some. It is really durable and I like it a lot! If you have a dog, that’s a chewer or is a larger breed, I’m not sure if this cage is for you. With the chewer, it is compressed wood so it would be easy to chew through. For a large breed, there is only one lock. So they might be able to push it open with their weight. I hope this helped! :)
authors_reviews.author: Aimee

authors_reviews.title: The prettiest doggy kennel ever!
authors_reviews.text: Very easy to assemble, only need a screw driver. It's very sturdy and it made with great materials. It's perfect size for a small to medium dog. I have a french bulldog puppy on the way and he will fit in this perfectly! It also comes with a doggy bed/ pad for the bottom. So worth the money - the cheaper ones are very unattractive and I plan on keeping this one long term.
authors_reviews.author: Brenna

authors_reviews.title: Quality product
authors_reviews.text: This crate/end table has changed our living room from a room full of dog crates to a room with beautiful end tables that are very useful!!!It was relatively easy to assemble, all the parts were there and its quality construction. This is not a flimsy crate at all. Very sturdy!! We crate pugs in there and they aren't destructive so I can't speak to that but it seems like it would hold up quite well.Very happy we made this purchase!!!
authors_reviews.author: Kindle Customer
